results.title: Oxygen consumption and gait variables of Arabian endurance horses (field exercise test)
results.judge_reason: Directly studies O2 consumption and gait variables in Arabian endurance horses, supporting the source-side mechanism but lacks explicit LRC or phase-coupling terminology.

results.title: Patterns of Horse-Rider Coordination during Endurance Race: Dynamical System Approach (PMC)
results.judge_reason: Covers coordination dynamics in endurance horses but focuses on horse-rider coupling rather than gait-respiration LRC oscillator framing.

results.title: Stride Efficiency in Racehorses (Horse Racing Sense)
results.judge_reason: Explicitly mentions stride efficiency, locomotor-respiratory coupling, and DMRT3 gene, hitting three source-side content words directly.

results.title: STAR: Decode-Phase Rescheduling for LLM Inference
results.judge_reason: Targets decode-phase rescheduling for LLM inference but does not frame as two-oscillator coupling or address LRC analogue.

results.title: Predicting LLM Output Length (ICLR 2026)
results.judge_reason: Output-length prediction is tangential to phase-locked decode/KV oscillator coupling and does not address LRC analogue.

results.title: Towards Efficient LLM Inference via Collective and Adaptive Speculative Decoding (SC25)
results.judge_reason: Decoupled SSM/LLM pipelined execution shares structural parallels with two-clock coupling but never formalizes phase-locking ratios.

results.title: Efficient LLM System with Speculative Decoding (UC Berkeley 2025)
results.judge_reason: General speculative-decoding system design with no oscillator/phase-coupling or KV-eviction phase-lock framing.

results.title: LLM Inference Scheduling Survey (TechRxiv Oct 2025)
results.judge_reason: Broad scheduling survey without explicit phase-locked decoder/KV-cache oscillator coupling framing.
